actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The triceratops makes two Gore attacks.

actions.name: Gore
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. Hit: 19 (2d12 + 6) Piercing damage. If the target is Huge or smaller and the triceratops moved 20+ feet straight toward it immediately before the hit, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) Piercing damage and has the Prone condition.

tactical_info.combat_role: Heavy Charger - Massive prehistoric tank with devastating charges
tactical_info.positioning: Uses 50 ft speed for charging attacks, benefits from distance for momentum
tactical_info.damage_output: 19 piercing damage per gore (28 total with charge), multiattack for 38-56 damage
tactical_info.key_abilities: Multiattack gore, charge damage bonus with prone effect, huge size control
tactical_info.weaknesses: Low dexterity and initiative, vulnerable to ranged attacks
tactical_info.synergies: Excellent for open terrain encounters and as mounted combat option
